name: guest_mode_maintains_comfort
description: Warm day with occupancy=guest. Classification applies comfort setpoints (not away setback). Sensor open triggers pause (guest mode does not suppress pausing). Verifies guest mode runs automation normally without away-mode setback.
notes: The simulator SimState.occupancy is 'home' | 'away' | 'vacation'. Guest mode is not yet a distinct
occupancy value in the simulator. Setting guest mode via config initial_occupancy is not supported.
This scenario uses occupancy='home' as a proxy for guest behavior (same logic path — no setback).
When the simulator gains guest occupancy support, update this scenario to use occupancy_change guest.
simulator_support: false on the guest-specific assertion; logic-track assertions for pause behavior.
Covers Priority 4 guest mode from plan abundant-mapping-clarke.md.

events.note: Warm morning: indoor 74.5F (just above comfort_cool), outdoor 80F — too warm for nat-vent
Warm-day classification with guest at home — should apply comfort_cool=74F (not setback)
Guest opens front door — should trigger pause (outdoor too warm for nat-vent)

assertions.reason: Guest occupancy: classification applies comfort band — same as home mode, no away setback.
P3: comfort band ceiling=comfort_cool=74F confirms guest receives home-mode comfort (not setback ceiling).
Guest mode does not suppress door/window pausing — outdoor 80F > threshold, pause fires

verdict.summary: Guest mode runs automation normally: comfort setpoints applied, pausing unaffected
verdict.observed_behavior: classification_applied (74F) at 9 AM; paused on sensor_open at 11 AM
verdict.expected_behavior: Guest occupancy = home-mode comfort (no setback); normal pause behavior on sensor open
